questions: When you're sleeping and making those little buzzing noises, are you dreaming about chasing something really fast, or maybe just finding a comfy spot?
You really like chasing things, huh? If you could chase *anything* in the whole world right now, what would it be?
Belly rubs are the best, right? If you had to rate today's belly rubs on a scale of one to ten barks, what would you give them?
If you could send a message to all the squirrels in LA, what would you want them to know?
Hey Kylo! It’s great to chat with you. You seem like a dog with a lot going on. What’s the very best part of your whole morning routine?
If you could trade one dislike (like baths) for one favorite activity (like chasing), which trade would you make?
I hear you like music, especially the big, loud kind. When you hear that orchestral music, what kind of running or playing do you feel like doing?
You have an owner who's always thinking up new things. What's the silliest thing your human has ever tried to get you to do?
Do you prefer watching the humans chase things (like maybe during a game of fetch) or doing the chasing yourself?
Do you ever watch your human when they are doing their own work or activities, and if so, what looks the most confusing to you?
Belly rubs are the best, aren't they? What’s the perfect way your human needs to scratch your belly to make it just right?
What’s the silliest thing your human has ever done that made you tilt your head and wonder what they were thinking?
When you’re relaxing and feeling super cozy, maybe after a long walk, what kind of surface do you absolutely *have* to be on? Is it soft and squishy, or something else?
Belly rubs are the best, aren't they? If you had to grade the quality of the last belly rub you got, what score would you give it out of ten barks?
What’s your favorite kind of thing to chase? Is it a ball, a toy, or something else entirely?
When you have to be still—like when you’re being held still or maybe getting brushed—what’s the first thought that pops into your head to try and get free?
What's the most interesting smell you've encountered on a walk recently?
When your human tries to keep you still for too long—like maybe for a bath—what’s your first instinct?
If you had a magic button that could instantly summon any type of food, what would you press it for right now?
When you hear music, especially that orchestral stuff, what kind of moving or chasing are you imagining? Is it a slow dance or a full-on sprint?
When you're looking up at the big, open sky, what do you think you're looking for up there?
If you could choose the soundtrack for your entire day, what genre would you pick, besides orchestral?
You seem very energetic when you get excited. What's the usual 'trigger' that sends you into your most energetic zoomies?
When you’re observing things, like maybe a game outside, what makes you decide to just watch instead of joining in the action?
When you’re dreaming and making those funny buzzing noises, are you usually dreaming about chasing something good?
When you’re looking at the sky, are you noticing clouds, birds, airplanes, or maybe just the big blue space?
What’s a memory from when you were a puppy that still makes you feel super happy?
What’s your opinion on baths? If you could veto bath time forever, would you?
Do you ever catch yourself making those little buzzing noises when you’re dreaming? What do you think you’re dreaming about when that happens?
Hey Kylo, you seem like a dog with a lot of opinions! If you could pick one sound in the whole world to listen to forever, what would it be?
Hey Kylo! It’s great to chat with you. You seem like a dog with a lot going on. What’s the very best part of your whole morning routine?
You know how you love chasing things—if you could choose *one* thing in the whole wide world to chase right now, what would it be?
Do you ever try to 'herd' or organize the things you're chasing, or is it pure impulse?
Tell me about the last time you had a really good, energetic chase. What was it?
Thinking about your favorite orchestral music pieces, do they sound more like a fast pounce or a steady trot?
If you could talk to the squirrels, what do you think you’d tell them?
You’re a Shiba, which means you're pretty smart. What’s one trick or command you know you’re excellent at?
If you could tell your human one thing about bath time without using words, what kind of dramatic look would you give them to show how much you dislike it?
If you could pick the background music for your morning routine—the getting-up, the stretching, the breakfast—what genre would you choose?
I know you're not a fan of the rain. If the sky is gray and cloudy, what's your go-to plan for making the day better?
When you have those buzzing noises while sleeping, what kind of dreams do you think you're having? Are you chasing something good?
When you're sleeping and buzzing, does it feel like you're running in your dreams?
When you’re asleep and making those little buzzing noises, are you dreaming about chasing something really fast?
Thinking about all the running around you do, what's the fastest you've ever run, and what was making you go that fast?
If you had to choose between a sunny, warm day and a cool, breezy day, which one makes you feel the most ready to go?
You know how you get really energetic? What kind of thing usually gets you *most* excited?
Have you ever heard a piece of music so good that it made you stop whatever you were doing just to stand still and listen?
Do you ever get jealous when your human is paying attention to something that isn't you?
If you could have an endless supply of belly rubs, where would you want me to scratch you the most?
If you could describe your favorite nap spot using just smells and textures, what would you say?
Thinking back, what’s one of the best adventures or exciting moments you’ve had recently?
